description:
Recto: Legal query involving partners in the royal mint whose money was stolen. In particular, when one of the partners runs away and hides so he doesn't have to pay his share. Written in Hebrew. Probably from the time of Avraham Maimuni, but not addressed to him.
(Cf. T-S 20.83: an enormous legal deed dated March 12 1066 CE involving a 1000-dinar claim resulting from two partners work in the royal mint. 20.83 is another document regarding inheritance. It is not connected to this legal query. AA)
NB: PGP previously incorrectly listed this document as NLI 577.5/41 (AA).
description_he: שאלה הלכתית בדבר שותפים בטביעה מלכותית שכספם נגנב; ובפרט כאשר אחד השותפים ברח מפני תשלום חלקו; בעברית; כנראה מזמן אברהם מימוני
